title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/cgroups to v0.0.3 - autoclosed
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/cgroups (github.com/opencontainers/cgroups)</summary>

### [`v0.0.3`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/releases/tag/v0.0.3)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.2...v0.0.3)

#### What's Changed

- ConvertCPUSharesToCgroupV2Value: improve by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/20](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/20)
- Add .github/dependabot.yml by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/15](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/15)
- Remove annotations from Resources (fixes a regression introduced in v0.0.2) by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/22](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/22)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.2...v0.0.3

</details>
